title: Wilted Silky Ukrainian Dinner Solo
description: A savory and silky Ukrainian-inspired solo dinner made with a twist of Panang curry paste, steamed to perfection in a bamboo steamer basket.
instructions: In a small saucepan, whisk together chicken broth and Panang curry paste over medium heat until warm.
Add silken tofu, green onions, parsley, and grated carrot to the saucepan. Whisk until tofu is well combined and silky.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, until the flavors are melded together.
Meanwhile, prepare the bamboo steamer basket by placing it over boiling water. Cover the basket with a lid.
Once the steamer is ready, carefully pour the Panang curry mixture into the steamer basket.
Steam for 8-10 minutes, until the tofu is tender and the flavors are well infused.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
